title: Paul Cherry
compiled_truth: Paul Cherry is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-06), Paul Cherry sent 23 and received 260 emails, totalling 283 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rod Hayslett](people/rod-hayslett) (10), [Sandy Sheffield](people/sandy-sheffield) (7), [Jerry Peters](people/jerry-peters) (7), [Kimberly Watson](people/kimberly-watson) (7), [Angela White](people/angela-white) (6).
